comments: Approved. git show for commit bc2fa16 matches the execution result artifact exactly: implementation changes are limited to README.md plus files under documentation/EN/ and documentation/ZH/, and artifact changes are limited to tasks/v0.7-docs-patch-execution-result.json and tasks/v0.7-docs-patch-result-review-packet.json. The rewritten documentation consistently repositions the project around the Harness -> Workflow -> Orchestration/Collaboration -> Execution -> Evaluation -> Acceptance model and includes Mermaid diagrams in README.md, documentation/EN/ARCHITECTURE.md, documentation/EN/README.md, documentation/ZH/ARCHITECTURE.md, and documentation/ZH/README.md. No src/ files, MCP capability files, workflow/dispatch.json, iteration-state.json, or .agent-state/ implementation files were modified in the reviewed commit.
